\tzpentry{ID4719}{Vector Potential Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4719 introduces Vector Potential Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\n(\\partial_t)(\\nabla$\\times$)(A)(\\nabla^2 - \\frac{1}{c^2}\\,\\partial_t^2)\\int $\\rho$\\,dV = N.\n\\]
